title: Lawn Mower Starting Ignition Switch 3 Position 5 Terminals Mower Starter Key Replaces for MTD 725-0267 725-0267A 925-0267 925-0267A for Husqvarna 5065587-01
features: Application Models: Universal Compatible for Lawn Mowers,for Toro,for Craftsman,for Snapper,for Scag,for MTD,for John Deere Lawn Tractor
High quality: These ignition switches are made of high-quality aluminum, durable and long-lasting. It can replace your old/tacky lawn ignition starter switch and works well.
5 Spade Connections: 5 terminals : S /L /G /B /M allow for accurate wiring configurations.
Package includes: 1pcs Lawn Mower Starting Ignition Switch with key,5pcs spring terminals
Note: Turn the key to the fully closed position before removing it; if the key is not in the fully closed position, it may become stuck.
description: Number of pin: 5 pins Positions: 3 Ignition Starter Switch is the replacement part numbers 925-0267, 925-0267A, 925-0267B, 725-0267, 725-0267A, 725-0267B, STD365402, 24688, 21064, 42106, 178280, 178280SM, 35100-772-003, 23-0660, 700172, 741308, 365402, 3621R, 4406R. It is compatible for MTD Craftsman GT6000; for JD 320 RX75 RX95 STX38 1010C AM102551 Mower for Toro SS5000 8-32, 23-0660 for Noma 44745 300275 for Murray 21064PA for Roper 365402, 4406R, 3621R for Scag 48017 for Stiga 1134-1814-01 for Husqvarna 5065587-01/5069171-01 Package includes: 1pcs Lawn Mower Starting Ignition Switch with key 5pcs spring terminals Note: Turn the key to the fully closed position before removing it; if the key is not in the fully closed position, it may become stuck.
